title: Mr. 3 Rebuilds His Advantage
description: On pages 11–14, mr. 3 rebuilds his advantage as miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display.
scene: Mr. 3 Rebuilds His Advantage. Miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: What'd I tell ya? Should have picked a pose while you still could.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Could you please be more serious here!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: trying to chase them isn't going to get us anywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: I really didn't want to have to use this thing on a couple of small fries like them but...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A pistol!? It's fine, we can dodge at least one bullet with pure will-power!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In any case, we have to go back in front of Luffy and the others!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: As the enemies said, that weird painting is their trap!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Last time when we bumped into Luffy, it was on his back.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The one who painted it on has got to be that easygoing- looking girl!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You won't be able to dodge this.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The latest model from South Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: With its rapid-fire ability, you won't even be able to see the bullets when I shoot with it.

summary: This part centers on mr. 3 rebuilds his advantage, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
